office_address: 1200 South Tryon Street, Suite 400, Charlotte, NC 28203
emergency_definition: If a sprinkler head is leaking or a fire alarm panel goes into fault
Fire alarm system in active alarm or fault condition
Any fire suppression system that's been compromised — like if a valve was shut accidentally and there's no fire protection for a building
Also if a sprinkler pipe bursts from freezing
integration_constraints: 05:00] Maria: OK that's way better than what we have now. One important thing — we use ServiceTrade for everything. But here's the rule: Clara should NEVER create sprinkler-related jobs in ServiceTrade. Our sprinkler team has their own process. Only fire alarm and inspection jobs can be created in ServiceTrade.
after_hours_flow_summary: After hours: Greet caller, note office is closed, determine purpose, check if emergency. If emergency: collect name, number, address, attempt routing via escalation chain. If non-emergency: collect details, confirm next-business-day callback.
office_hours_flow_summary: Business hours: Greet caller, determine purpose, check if emergency. If emergency: collect critical info and route immediately. If routine: collect name and number, transfer to office. If transfer fails: take message, confirm callback timeframe.
notes: Extracted from demo call — details may be preliminary and subject to change during onboarding.
